specs.title: cp-000: Editable perspective name fields
cp-001: Chevron toggle to expandcollapse each perspective
cp-002: Expanded perspectives show search queries section
cp-003: Each perspective has 34 search queries by default
cp-004: Query text displayed in editable input fields
cp-005: Add query link Plus icon lowercase appends new empty query
cp-006: Trash icon button icon-only no text label visible when 1 query exists
cp-007: Clicking Trash icon deletes that query row
cp-008: Regenerate button top right re-generates perspectives
cp-009: The page re-fetches perspectives but it does not pass isRegenerating so the butt
cp-010: Replaces perspectives with new set
cp-011: Confirm Start Research button bottom right blue with Play icon
